failedAssertions.reason: Share wizard metric selection step could not be visually verified because test user has no health data. Code review confirms period event types (sleep_stage, workout, meal) are implemented in ShareWizardStepMetrics component. Unit tests pass.

API Keys section UI exists but shows error state because backend /api/keys endpoint returns 404. The api-keys-backend feature is not yet implemented (milestone: api-keys, status: pending). UI component (ApiKeysSection) is correctly implemented and unit-tested.
Create API key flow blocked by missing backend /api/keys endpoint (404). CreateApiKeyDialog with scope selection, name input, and created key banner is fully implemented and unit-tested.
Revoke API key flow blocked by missing backend /api/keys endpoint (404). RevokeApiKeyDialog with confirmation is fully implemented and unit-tested.

API key shown-only-once flow blocked by missing backend /api/keys endpoint (404). CreatedKeyBanner shows full key once with copy button and warning; key list shows masked tokens. Code review and unit tests confirm correct implementation.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: browser section with isolation rules, authentication instructions for mock auth, test data info, and browser testing tips

notes: 15 of 20 assertions passed. 5 assertions failed: 4 are blocked by missing api-keys backend (VAL-MPUI-012, 013, 014, 020 - these depend on the api-keys milestone which is pending), and 1 (VAL-MPUI-009) could not be visually verified due to empty test data but code review confirms correct implementation. All UI components for the multi-provider-ui milestone are correctly implemented and unit-tested. The API key UI components will become functional once the api-keys-backend feature is implemented.
